title: Heroes
description: Heroic deeds documented. Heroes is filmed on location with the cooperation of members of the superhero community.
quote: By 7:30, 8:00, evil is wide awake. But we’re even wider. We’ve been up since 6:30!
altHero: viking woman superhero beating up a giant robot hand
alt3: two superheroes about to bust into an apartment
alt4: the Tick and his sidekick Arthur
